History.title: Route History
History.subtitle: All your saved routes in one place
History.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this route?
History.noResults: No routes found. Try changing the filters.
History.emptyTitle: You don't have any saved routes yet
History.emptyDescription: Create your first route and it will appear here. All your walks will be saved automatically.

hero.title: Smart Routes for Your Walks
hero.subtitle: Plan perfect routes with interesting places. Cafes, parks, museums — everything on your way.

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Everything you need for a perfect walk

smartRouting.title: Smart Route Building
smartRouting.description: Just tell where you want to stop by — the algorithm will find suitable places near your route and build an optimal path

categories.title: Interesting Places Along the Way
categories.description: Want to visit a cafe, walk through a park, or see a museum? Choose the type of place — the app will find options on your route

transport.title: Different Transport Modes
transport.description: Walking, driving, or public transport — choose the convenient way for each part of your journey

sharing.title: Share Routes
sharing.description: Send a link to friends — the route opens immediately on the map with all details

history.title: Route History
history.description: All your walks are saved automatically. Filter, sort, add to favorites

alternatives.title: Multiple Options to Choose
alternatives.description: For each point, the app suggests several places — choose what you like more by rating, photos, or location

step1.title: Set Starting Point
step1.description: Enter the address where you'll start your walk. You can select a place on the map or use your current geolocation

step2.title: Add Interesting Places
step2.description: Click 'Add place' and choose what you want to visit along the way: cafe, park, museum, or other. You can add multiple places in a row — the app will build a route through all points

step3.title: Choose Transport Mode
step3.description: For each route segment, specify how you'll get there: walking, driving, or public transport. This affects time calculation and route building

step4.title: Build the Route
step4.description: Click 'Build Route' button — the algorithm will find suitable places near your path and build an optimal route considering distances and direction

step5.title: Choose from Multiple Options
step5.description: For each route point, the app suggests several places. Swipe the carousel and choose what suits you better — the route will recalculate automatically

step6.title: Share with Friends and Save
step6.description: Click 'Share' button to copy the link — friends will see your route on the map. Sign in and click the bookmark to save the route to history

cta.title: Ready to Plan Your Walk?
cta.subtitle: Create your first route in a couple of minutes. It's free and doesn't require registration.

Footer.description: Plan smart routes with interesting places. Cafes, parks, museums — everything on your way.
